Reference

CLI Commands

319 commands across 5 layers. Each command consumes MCU credits on successful delivery.

👑 Founder Layer

Command Description MCU
mekong annual Generate annual report and OKR rollup 3
mekong okr Set and track OKRs across departments 2
mekong swot Run full SWOT analysis with AI insights 2
mekong fundraise End-to-end fundraising campaign manager 5
mekong pitch AI pitch deck generator with slide deck 3
mekong vc/cap-table Cap table modeling and dilution simulation 2
mekong ipo/readiness IPO readiness checklist and gap analysis 4

💼 Business Layer

Command Description MCU
mekong sales Sales pipeline, outreach, and CRM automation 2
mekong marketing Full marketing campaign generation 3
mekong finance P&L, cash flow, and budget modeling 2
mekong hr Hiring plan, JDs, and onboarding 2
mekong pricing Pricing strategy and competitor analysis 2
mekong brand Brand identity and positioning workshop 3

🎯 Product Layer

Command Description MCU
mekong plan Product roadmap and feature prioritization 2
mekong sprint Sprint planning with story points 1
mekong roadmap Quarterly roadmap with milestones 2
mekong brainstorm Structured ideation session 1
mekong scope Feature scoping and requirements doc 2

⚙️ Engineering Layer

Command Description MCU
mekong cook Smart feature implementation (scout→plan→code→test→review) 1-5
mekong fix Diagnose and fix bugs with root cause analysis 1-3
mekong code Write or refactor code with full context 1-3
mekong test Run unit/integration/e2e tests, coverage analysis 1-2
mekong deploy Deploy to Cloudflare Pages/Workers 1
mekong review AI code review with severity ratings 2
mekong debug Systematic debugging with root cause tracing 1-3
mekong preview Visual explanations, diagrams, slides, ASCII art 0-1
mekong worktree Git worktree for parallel development 0
mekong check-and-commit Run quality checks → commit → push 0
mekong bootstrap Scaffold new project with research + tech stack 3-5
mekong scout Fast codebase scouting with parallel agents 0-1

🔧 Ops Layer

Command Description MCU
mekong audit Full infrastructure and security audit 3
mekong health System health check across all services 1
mekong security Security scan and vulnerability report 2
mekong status Real-time status dashboard 0
mekong clean Remove dead code and unused dependencies 1

Common Flags

FlagDescription
--dry-runPlan only, no execution0
--verboseShow step-by-step details0
--strictFail fast on any error0
--no-rollbackSkip rollback on failure0
--model <id>Override LLM model for this run0

💎 License Tiers

TierCommandsPrice
Freerun, sop, status, license, usage, help$0
Starter+ crm, finance, dashboard, cook, plan$8/mo
Pro+ kaizen, marketplace, deploy, review, raas, cli, rd scan$20/mo
Enterprise+ agi, solo, vc, swarm, live-dashboard, cto-brain, all$120/mo
